rss.title: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony
rss.snippet: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.

rss.title: Why friendly AI chatbots might be less trustworthy
rss.snippet: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".

rss.title: Musk accuses Altman of stealing a charity as courtroom battle begins
rss.snippet: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.

arxiv_papers.title: How Many Visual Levers Drive Urban Perception? Interventional Counterfactuals via Multiple Localised Edits
arxiv_papers.snippet: Street-view perception models predict subjective attributes such as safety at scale, but remain correlational: they do not identify which localized visual changes would plausibly shift human judgement for a specific scene. arxiv_papers.title: Diagnosing Urban Street Vitality via a Visual-Semantic and Spatiotemporal Framework for Street-Level Economics
arxiv_papers.snippet: Micro-scale street-level economic assessment is fundamental for precision spatial resource allocation.
